display.purpose: Landing page hero and major section headings. DM Serif Display at its largest — one per page, never in the app interior.

title.purpose: App page-level headings (h2.page-title). One per screen. The only serif element inside the app UI.

body.purpose: Task titles, form copy, descriptions, all functional content. The default register.

label.purpose: Form field labels, nav links, button text, item metadata. Short runs only; never for body copy.

caption.purpose: Course section headers in the dashboard. The only sanctioned uppercase tracked text in the app interior.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Default resting elevation for all cards and containers. Always present; imperceptible in isolation.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Applied on card hover. Confirms interactivity. Transitions at 150ms.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Reserved for dialogs and overlays that sit above page content.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default duration and easing for all state transitions (color, border, shadow, opacity).

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Short reveal animations (del-fadein, internship section open).

motion.name: ease-transform
motion.purpose: Transform-based transitions (hamburger lines, chevron rotation, badge pulse).

motion.name: pulse-dot
motion.purpose: Landing page hero badge pulse animation. Opacity and scale cycle.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Hamburger nav activates, calendar gets minimum width treatment.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hamburger nav replaces horizontal nav menu.

breakpoints.name: content-max
breakpoints.purpose: Maximum content width for app interior.

breakpoints.name: landing-max
breakpoints.purpose: Maximum content width for landing page.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary call-to-action. Solid Clarity Indigo. One per form or section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 36px; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #4f46e5; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; border-color: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The safe default action. White background, bordered. Paired next to a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 36px; background: #fff; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button (Ghost)
components.description: Destructive action in its default state — ghost red, requires a second confirmation step before executing.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 36px; background: #fff; color: #dc2626; border: 1px solid #fca5a5; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #fef2f2; border-color: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: The primary content unit. Holds a task title, optional description, due date, and the action strip.
components.html:
Write lab report — ENGG 301
Dec 14, 2025
components.css: .ds-task-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.06), 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.04); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-task-card:hover { border-color: #cbd5e1; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,.07), 0 2px 4px rgba(15,23,42,.04); } .ds-task-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-task-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; flex: 1; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-task-actions { display: flex; gap: 1px; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-action-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 30px; height: 30px; border: none; background: #fff; color: #64748b; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-complete-btn:hover { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; } .ds-edit-btn:hover { background: #eef2ff; color: #4f46e5; } .ds-delete-btn:hover { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; } .ds-task-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-top: 10px; } .ds-task-due { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #64748b; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Standard text input. 16px font prevents iOS zoom. Indigo focus ring at 12% opacity.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-form-label { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-form-input { padding: 9px 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-family: inherit; color: #0f172a; background: #fff; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; outline: none; } .ds-form-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-form-input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,0.12); } .ds-form-input:hover:not(:focus) { border-color: #cbd5e1; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Dark slate-900 sticky nav with logo, page links, and user section. The visual anchor of the entire app.
components.html:
UniTrack
  • Dashboard
  • Calendar
  • Quick Note
components.css: .ds-navbar { background: #0f172a; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-inner { width: 100%; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: #f8fafc; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-logo-mark { width: 24px; height: 24px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 5px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f8fafc; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #f8fafc; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }

components.name: Page Title
components.description: The single serif heading inside the app interior. DM Serif Display, 1.5rem, one per page.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap'); .ds-page-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-page-icon { color: #4f46e5; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Inbox Alert
components.description: Pending inbox notification banner. Known debt: currently uses a 4px left-stripe border — should be replaced with a full tinted background border.
components.html: 3 items waiting in Inbox
components.css: .ds-inbox-alert { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #fffbeb; border: 1px solid #fcd34d; border-left: 4px solid #d97706; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 24px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-alert-icon { color: #d97706; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; } .ds-alert-content { flex: 1; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-alert-content strong { color: #78350f; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #4f46e5; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-small { padding: 6px 12px; min-height: 32px; font-size: 0.8125rem; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; border-color: #4338ca; }

narrative.overview:
UniTrack's visual system is built around a single idea: a well-calibrated instrument disappears in use. The UI does not announce itself. It holds information without decoration, responds to interaction without drama, and rewards close attention with structural clarity. Slate stillness. Indigo precision. A dark navbar that anchors the chrome; a white body that holds the work.

The system rejects two aesthetics by name. First, the generic SaaS productivity aesthetic — pastel blobs, rounded gradients, "streamline your workflow" energy, Asana-style milestone celebrations. Second, the gamified app aesthetic — confetti, streaks, achievement badges, encouraging microcopy. UniTrack is a personal tool built by an engineer for an engineer. It does not try to motivate; it enables.

The landing page is exempt from the interior's restraint. There, the serif and indigo can move forward. In the app, they stay at the back.
keyCharacteristics: Dark slate-900 navbar anchors the chrome; near-white body holds the work
Indigo as the single accent voice — used sparingly, always carrying meaning
DM Serif Display for page titles and hero headings; system-sans for all functional copy
Shadows imply lift without announcing it — ambient and barely perceptible at rest
Dense information with explicit breathing room between groups

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Clarity Indigo is the only non-semantic accent in the system. Do not introduce a second accent color. If a surface needs visual distinction, use a background tint or a border step — not a new hue.

rules.name: The Warm-Neutral Prohibition
rules.body: Page Mist (#F8FAFC) is cool-tinted. Never drift the background toward warm or sandy tones. Warmth in this system lives in the typography pairing, not in the surface color.

rules.name: The Serif Ceiling Rule
rules.body: DM Serif Display appears only at Title level and above. Never use it for body copy, labels, buttons, or metadata. Below the page title, the system is pure sans.

rules.name: The One Uppercase Zone Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked text is reserved for course section headers — structural dividers that group task cards. It must not appear as marketing eyebrows, card labels, or button text.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest carry only Ambient shadow. Hover Lift exists to confirm interactivity — it should never appear on non-interactive elements. If something can't be clicked, it doesn't lift.

dos: Use Clarity Indigo only when it carries meaning — focus, primary action, active state, today's date. Its rarity is what makes it legible.
Use DM Serif Display only for page-level titles and landing hero headings. One serif heading per screen.
Apply Ambient shadow as the default resting elevation for all cards and containers. Never zero-shadow a surface that sits on the page.
Differentiate surface depth through background color steps before adding borders or shadows.
Use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 headings to prevent orphaned words.
Expand touch targets to ~44px on icon buttons via pseudo-element, while keeping the visual footprint at its intended size.
Provide a two-step confirmation before any destructive action. Never a window.confirm() dialog.
Keep uppercase tracked text confined to course-section dividers in the dashboard.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color. Clarity Indigo is the only non-semantic accent in the system.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Prohibited regardless of context.
Don't replicate the generic SaaS productivity aesthetic: pastel blobs, rounded gradients, feature-highlight carousels, or Asana/Monday-style milestone celebrations.
Don't add gamification elements: streaks, achievement badges, confetti, progress celebrations.
Don't drift the page background toward warm or sandy tones. Page Mist (#F8FAFC) is cool-tinted.
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section on the landing page.
Don't extend the left-stripe border pattern (border-left > 1px as a colored accent). The existing inbox-alert border-left: 4px is known debt.
Don't apply Hover Lift shadow to non-interactive elements. Elevation implies clickability.
